$dates = @(
"2022-03-30",
"2022-04-01","2022-04-05","2022-04-13","2022-04-21","2022-04-25","2022-04-26","2022-04-27","2022-04-28","2022-04-29",
"2022-05-10","2022-05-11","2022-05-12","2022-05-13","2022-05-16","2022-05-18","2022-05-23","2022-05-25","2022-05-30",
"2022-06-01","2022-06-07","2022-06-08","2022-06-09","2022-06-10","2022-06-13","2022-06-20","2022-06-27","2022-06-28","2022-06-29","2022-06-30",
"2022-07-01","2022-07-04","2022-07-11","2022-07-25","2022-07-26","2022-07-27","2022-07-28","2022-07-29",
"2022-08-02","2022-08-03","2022-08-10","2022-08-17","2022-08-22","2022-08-23","2022-08-24","2022-08-25","2022-08-26",
"2022-09-06","2022-09-07","2022-09-08","2022-09-09","2022-09-12","2022-09-14","2022-09-19","2022-09-21","2022-09-26","2022-09-28",
"2022-10-04","2022-10-05","2022-10-06","2022-10-07","2022-10-17","2022-10-18","2022-10-19","2022-10-20","2022-10-21","2022-10-25",
"2022-11-02","2022-11-10","2022-11-14","2022-11-15","2022-11-16","2022-11-17","2022-11-18"
)

foreach ($date in $dates) {
    Add-Content activity.txt "$date commit"
    git add activity.txt
    $env:GIT_AUTHOR_DATE="$date 12:00:00"
    $env:GIT_COMMITTER_DATE="$date 12:00:00"
    git commit -m "Activity on $date"
}2022-03-30 commit
2022-04-01 commit
2022-04-05 commit
2022-04-13 commit
2022-04-21 commit
2022-04-25 commit
2022-04-26 commit
